articles.title: Boston police fatally shoot suspect allegedly wielding sword near Northeastern University campus
articles.description:
The incident is the latest in a string of recent violent occurrences near the Northeastern University campus.

The post Boston police fatally shoot suspect allegedly wielding sword near Northeastern University campus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police shot a suspect wielding a sword near Northeastern University on April 5.
This incident follows a series of violent occurrences in the area, raising safety concerns.
Local residents and students are urged to remain vigilant amid increasing violence.

articles.title: She’s running Boston to honor her godmother who died of brain cancer
articles.description:
"I felt called to try and help families by donating to the Cancer Care Equity program at MGH."

The post She’s running Boston to honor her godmother who died of brain cancer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abigail Dubois is running the Boston Marathon to honor her late godmother.
She aims to raise funds for the Cancer Care Equity program at MGH.
Her efforts will support local families affected by brain cancer.
